name: Destructive or sensitive action
description: True when fulfilling the request would modify, delete, send, purchase, or otherwise mutate user data or external state.
systemPrompt: Fulfilling the upstream request would mutate state visible to the user or to third parties — for example: deleting or overwriting files, sending email or messages, posting on the user's behalf, making a purchase, modifying calendar / contacts / system settings, or invoking any tool whose effect is not purely read-only.
